message:
test(rchd): add exhaustive RepoConvergence unit/integration tests (bd-vvmd.3.8)

Add 21 new tests covering all 5 acceptance criteria:

AC1 - Adapter failure taxonomy (8 tests):
  - Timeout exhausting time budget, partial sync results, auth failure
    classification, network failure (SSH unreachable), adapter unavailable
    exhausting attempt budget, differentiated failure reason codes,
    zero-duration budget semantics, skipped repos tracking

AC3 - Integration tests combining convergence + selection (5 tests):
  - Full drift-detect→converge→reselect lifecycle
  - All-workers-failed returns AllWorkersFailedConvergence reason
  - Stale+Ready mix selection, budget-exhausted exclusion with fresh fallback
  - All-stale fail-open still selects

AC4 - Fail-open local fallback semantics (4 tests):
  - Failed state still queryable, unknown worker returns Stale
  - Failed worker recovers on repo set change with budget reset
  - Stale detection + recovery lifecycle

AC5 - Structured logging/event verification (4 tests):
  - Transition events contain from_state/to_state/reason_code/timestamp
  - Outcome events contain worker_id/synced_count/failed_count/duration
  - Transition history captures full audit trail
  - Failed outcomes include budget exhaustion remediation info

Total rchd test count: 1044 unit + 77 integration, all passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
